news.title: STAT+: FDA approves Vera Therapeutics kidney disease treatment
news.summary: The FDA approved a new medicine from the biotech company Vera Therapeutics for patients with a type of chronic autoimmune kidney disease.

news.title: STAT+: The crumbling employer-based health insurance system
news.summary: Today's D.C. Diagnosis newsletter covers maintaining diversity in drug trials and troubling trends in employer-based health insurance.

news.title: STAT+: Compass says depression drug has long-lasting benefits
news.summary: Vertex makes its largest-ever deal, skyrocketing health insurance costs, and more biotech news from The Readout

news.title: STAT+: America’s employer health insurance is decaying
news.summary: STAT's Bob Herman examines the under-the-radar crisis brewing in employer-based health insurance.

news.title: STAT+: ‘Secret shopper’ study probes GLP-1 telehealth sites
news.summary: In this edition of STAT Health Tech: A 'secret shopper' study of telehealth sites prescribing GLP-1s, news about Epic, Anthropic, and brain implants.

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a $10 billion Vertex deal, the pace of FDA drug approvals, and more
news.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals will spend $10 billion to acquire Crinetics Pharmaceuticals and its drug for a rare endocrine disorder

news.title: Ebola outbreak exposes a fractured outbreak response system
news.summary: The costly threat to employer-based health care, Gen Z doctors, and more health news

news.title: 5 takeaways from STAT’s series on the soaring cost of health insurance
news.summary: Read the 5 key takeaways from STAT's series "Out of Pocket, Out of Reach," an examination of workplace health insurance.

news.title: Opinion: What if this Ebola outbreak can’t be stopped?
news.summary: In the past, the possibility of endemic Ebola was unthinkable. This time is different, write Ivan Buendia Gayton and Eric D. Perakslis.

news.title: STAT+: This whistleblower took on a health insurance giant and a political machine. She’s not stopping there
news.summary: America’s employers must stop acting helpless in the face of health care industry profiteering, Chris Deacon says.

news.title: STAT+: America’s small businesses are giving up on health insurance
news.summary: America's employer-based health insurance system is crumbling. STAT investigates why, in our new series, “Out of Pocket, Out of Reach.”

news.title: STAT+: For a Georgia entrepreneur, health coverage has never been affordable
news.summary: Amy Bielawski is one of the 30 million people who run their own businesses. She's gone most of her life without health insurance.

news.title: Opinion: Medicine thinks Gen Z is too soft. It’s wrong
news.summary: “Gen Z physicians are on a collision course with institutions still built around older assumptions,” writes Frantz M. Berthaud.

news.title: STAT+: Vertex acquires Crinetics Pharmaceuticals for $10 billion as biotech M&A booms
news.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals will spend $10 billion to acquire Crinetics Pharmaceuticals and its drug for a rare endocrine disorder, the companies said.

news.title: Obamacare rolls shrank dramatically in many states over the past year, new federal data shows
news.summary: States across the country saw steep drops in the number of people covered by the Affordable Care Act over the past year, according to new federal data.

news.title: Nonprofit-private equity joint ventures worth scrutiny, PESP report says
news.summary: Private equity may enter healthcare markets through joint ventures with nonprofits and other healthcare providers. This extends across subsectors, and for a variety of reasons requires greater regulatory oversight, the report said.

news.title: Independent pharmacies hit Prime Therapeutics with antitrust suit over alleged price fixing
news.summary: A group representing thousands of pharmacies has filed an antitrust suit against Prime Therapeutics, alleging that the company colluded with rival Express Scripts to fix prices.

news.title: Nonprofit hospitals are embracing high-risk, high-reward investment portfolios. Is that a problem?
news.summary: A newly published study of nonprofit hospitals' tax forms outlines huge swings in investment returns and an increasing foray into non-publicly traded vehicles like private equity and venture capital.

news.title: Lenz Therapeutics rolls out telehealth offering for Vizz prescription eye drops
news.summary: A patient-driven telehealth Rx model is more sustainable given the success of other aesthetic Rx products offered via telehealth, including GLP-1s and acne medications, Leerink Partners analysts wrote.

news.title: Fierce Healthcare Layoff Tracker—Dignity Health lays off 139; Adventist Health trims 132 roles
news.summary: Stick with this tracker for the latest layoff and workforce updates from across healthcare.

news.title: Ascension plans to acquire independent system Williamson Health for nearly $1B
news.summary: The offer, unanimously approved by Williamson's board of trustees, includes a $700 million price tag and $250 million of capital support over 10 years, beating out other proposals from HCA Healthcare and Optum. The partners are now working on a nonbinding letter of intent for county board approval.

news.title: Allegheny Health Network acquires Heritage Valley Health System
news.summary: The affiliation agreement brings two new hospitals plus 36 physician offices and multi-specialty outpatient facilities to Allegheny Health Network.

news.title: Handspring Health lands $19M series B to expand behavioral health model for youth
news.summary: The startup, which launched four years ago, picked up $19 million in series B funding to grow its clinician workforce, expand value-based care partnerships with payers and broaden its geographic reach.

news.title: AI care partner Heidi puts a spin on pharma ad tropes in new campaign to relieve 'side effects'
news.summary: Heidi, alongside creative firm Cocogun and media agency TRG, have launched a new brand campaign that positions its AI tool as a dose of "relief, on repeat."

news.title: Palomar Health, UCSD Health join operations to form new regional system
news.summary: Palomar UC San Diego Health combines the strengths of a community-based health system and an academic health system under a single unified governance structure, executives said.

news.title: Medicare Advantage plans set to rake in $13B in 2026 quality bonus payments
news.summary: The feds are set to pay out at least $13.4 billion in Medicare quality bonus payments this year, up slightly year-over-year and reflecting a rapid escalation in spending over the past decade, a new report shows.

news.title: Elevance Health sues CMS over MA star ratings recalculations
news.summary: Elevance Health is suing the feds over its recent recalculations for the 2026 Medicare Advantage star ratings.

news.title: MeiraGTx scores $400M from Oberland Capital to help get 2 gene therapies to commercialization
news.summary: As MeiraGTx lines up the pieces for a commercial push, the company has new funding to work with.

news.title: Beckman Coulter grows Alzheimer’s dx portfolio with CE mark for new assay
news.summary: Diagnostics specialist Beckman Coulter expanded its portfolio of Alzheimer’s disease diagnostics by earning a CE mark in Europe for its Access p-Tau217 assay.

news.title: Whitehawk swoops in for five ADCs via development deal with China's Biocytogen
news.summary: Biocytogen and Whitehawk Therapeutics are joining forces to develop bispecific antibody-drug conjugates using Biocytogen's discovery platform.

news.title: Boehringer bags PVT’s viral vector platform for cancer vaccine R&D
news.summary: Boehringer Ingelheim has landed an exclusive license to Prime Vector Technologies’ viral vector platform for developing next-generation cancer vaccines.

news.title: As US lawmakers increase scrutiny of Chinese trials, industry fears ‘huge distraction and expense’
news.summary: As U.S. lawmakers continue to scrutinize the consequences of China’s expanding role in biotech innovation, industry insiders have been left debating how they can navigate this shifting landscape—or even whether biotechs should abandon China altogether.

news.title: Endevica spinout Kalohexis submits confidential IPO filing to develop obesity challenger to GLP-1s
news.summary: Clinical-stage Kalohexis is readying a public listing to support its obesity and cancer cachexia treatments.

news.title: Novo Nordisk pens long-acting GLP-1 implant tech deal with Vivani Medical
news.summary: As Novo Nordisk looks for new ways to broaden its semaglutide GLP-1 franchise, the Danish drugmaker has signed a new deal with Californian medtech Vivani Medical to help.

news.title: Kailera’s oral GLP-1 asset sees 11% weight loss, hits goals in Chinese phase 3 obesity and diabetes trials
news.summary: Phase 3 trials of Kailera Therapeutics’ oral GLP-1 prospect have hit their primary endpoints, positioning the biotech’s partner Hengrui Pharma to seek approval in obesity and diabetes in China.

news.title: NICE recommends Endosure and Endotest diagnostics for endometriosis
news.summary: Women in England are set to gain new, taxpayer-funded tests for endometriosis after NICE recommended them for regular use.

news.title: Vertex, in its largest-ever deal, acquires endocrine disease specialist Crinetics for $10B
news.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals has struck a $10 billion deal—its largest ever—to acquire endocrine disease specialist Crinetics Pharmaceuticals. The transaction's two focuses, Palsonify and atumelnant, have combined peak sales potential of more than $5 billion, Vertex said.

news.title: Can We Outrun Cancer's Evolution? Why BrYet Is Targeting Cancer-Specific Phenotypes
news.summary: Genetic instability makes metastatic cancer largely incurable. BrYet aims to work around it with a new approach targeting cancer-specific phenotypes.

news.title: Fierce Biotech Layoff Tracker 2026: BioCryst ends internal programs; Biogen sheds Apellis R&D roles
news.summary: As always, if you know of layoffs occurring at a biotech, please reach out to the Fierce Biotech editorial team.

news.title: 摩根士丹利最新AI报告解读：真正创造最大价值的公司，可能尚未成立
news.summary: 摩尔定律终结与瓶颈迁移。

news.title: 纯机械无源牵引解决全场景颈椎康复痛点，盛达安康寻求200万种子轮融资
news.summary: 千亿脊柱康复赛道缺口，盛达安康募200万推无源牵引方案

papers.title: Layer-wise Cross-Lingual Depression Detection from Speech: Analysis with Contrastive Alignment
papers.summary: Significant disparities exist in the diagnosis and clinical presentation of depression across different linguistic populations. Speech-based depression detection performs well monolingually, but cross-lingual generalization remains an open challenge. A key reason is that prior work uses segment-level random splits without speaker grouping, leading to identity leakage that inflates reported metrics. We propose CLeaD, a supervised contrastive alignment framework that maps WavLM embeddings from English and Mandarin into a shared clinical space, without parallel data or target-language fine-tuning

papers.title: Look Before You Leap: Distilling Tree Search into Action Evaluation for Frozen VLA Models
papers.summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models acquire broad embodied capabilities through large-scale pretraining, yet their generalization remains far more fragile than that of LLMs and VLMs. The prevailing remedy, post-training via supervised fine-tuning or reinforcement learning, improves task-specific performance but narrows the generalist capability that makes pretraining valuable. We identify a key bottleneck: VLA failures stem not only from action generation but also from action evaluation. A diagnostic pass@k study confirms that frozen VLAs already contain competent behaviors in their output dis

papers.title: Transition-Aware best-of-N sampling for Longitudinal Chest X-ray Reports
papers.summary: In longitudinal clinical practice, every chest X-ray is read in the context of the patients prior exam, and much of what the radiologist communicates is the change from one visit to the next. To the best of our knowledge, we present the first training-free best-of-N sampling scheme for pre-trained chest X-ray report generators that is explicitly aware of this longitudinal prior to current transition. We call it transition-aware best-of-N sampling, each report is split into sentences and embedded into an unordered set in Rd; each (prior, current) pair is reduced to a fixed-dim directional vecto

papers.title: CONFLUX: A Latent Diffusion Model for 3D Chest-CT Synthesis with RL Post-Training
papers.summary: Controllable generative models of 3D medical images can synthesize volumes with specified clinical attributes, but this demands samples that are simultaneously high-fidelity, natively 3D, and faithful to the requested conditioning. We present CONFLUX, a latent diffusion model for chest computed tomography (CT): a 3D variational autoencoder compresses each volume, and a rectified-flow transformer generates in the latent space. Generation is conditioned on structured radiological metadata (18 abnormality findings, sex, age, and reconstruction kernel) through adaptive layer normalization. The mod
